headline: Cadence Design Systems (NasdaqGS:CDNS) Valuation Check After Aeva Licensing Win In 4D LiDAR And Robotics
summary: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) drew fresh investor attention after Aeva licensed its Tensilica Vision DSP IP for 4D LiDAR, further connecting Cadence’s signal processing technology to industrial robotics and autonomous automotive applications. See our latest analysis for Cadence Design Systems. Cadence’s recent design win with Aeva lands at a time when momentum in the shares has been strong, with a 30 day share price return of 34.77% and a 5 year total shareholder return of 195.56%. This...
